verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus he's the way maker x3 Now one day he made a way Oh glory When I was lost in sin He came and took me in One day he made a way for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I saw the Lord x2 He was high and lifted up And His train filled the temple x2 The angels cried holy The angel cried holy is the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now one day the sun refused to shine Down in this sinful life of mine I cried both night and day That Jesus would make a way He hear my humble prayer And He answered right then and there Now one day He made a way for me
